name: sdd-beads
description: Connects approved spec-driven development plans to Beads execution queues without creating a second specification source of truth.

interface.shortDescription: Project execution bridge for SDD plans and Beads
interface.longDescription: Publishes approved SDD plan structure into Beads, coordinates implementation claims, and reconciles execution state while keeping SDD artifacts authoritative for scope and completion.
defaultPrompt: Publish this approved SDD plan to Beads.
Claim and implement this SDD task through Beads.
Reconcile this SDD plan with its Beads issues.
